name: The Waterbase Limited
summary: The Waterbase Limited operates as an aquaculture company in India. It produces and trades in shrimp feed, such as IQF, block frozen, and cooked Vannamei, tiger shrimp, and scampi feed; and other feed, as well as farm care products under the Baylife brand. The company also engages in shrimp hatchery activities. It markets its products under the BayWhite, Ultra XL, Tiger Bay XL, and Magnum brands. The company also exports its products to Japan, the United States, Europe, and internationally. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Chennai, India. The Waterbase Limited is a subsidiary of Nav Srijit Shakti Telangana Private Limited.
